_metadata.title: Battery Production Energy & Carbon Benchmarks
_metadata.description: Reference benchmarks for EU 2023/1542 DPP pre-audit plausibility checks. Values are derived from publicly available scientific literature and EU JRC Technical Reports.
sources: JRC Technical Reports on Carbon Footprint of EV Batteries (2020, 2023)
Lifecycle Assessment of Lithium-Ion Batteries — Romare & Dahllöf, IVL Swedish Environmental Research Institute (2017)
Global Battery Alliance — Battery Passport Content Guidance v1.2 (2022)
BNEF Electric Vehicle Battery Price Survey (2022–2024)
Nature Energy: 'A better future for lithium-ion batteries' (2021)
OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals (3rd Ed.)
_metadata.disclaimer: These benchmarks are indicative ranges for pre-audit plausibility checks only. They do not constitute legal thresholds under EU 2023/1542 unless explicitly stated.

carbon_footprint_benchmarks._description: Lifecycle carbon footprint ranges in kg CO2e per kWh of battery capacity. Mandatory declaration under Article 7 + Annex XIII(1)(c). Values below the 'floor' trigger DATA_UNREALISTIC flag.

NMC.notes: High Ni NMC (NMC 811) tends toward lower end; NMC 111 toward upper end. Floor accounts for minimum theoretical energy of mining, processing and cell assembly.

NMC_811.notes: Lower Co content reduces mining emissions; Ni processing remains significant.

LFP.notes: No Co or Ni; lower critical-mineral extraction burden. Higher cell-level energy use due to lower energy density.

NCA.notes: Similar to NMC 811; Al processing adds minor burden.

LTO.notes: Very low energy density leads to high footprint per kWh; compensated by extreme cycle life.

LMFP.notes: Next-generation cathode; slightly higher energy density than LFP.

SOLID_STATE.notes: Pre-commercial; benchmarks highly uncertain. Floor estimated from lab-scale LCA studies.

recycled_content_thresholds._description: Minimum recycled content shares mandated by Article 8(2)(a)-(d). NON_COMPLIANT if any metal is below the applicable year target.

current_industry_averages_2024_pct.notes: Industry averages sourced from Global Battery Alliance Transparency Report 2024 and JRC estimates.

production_energy_benchmarks._description: Manufacturing energy intensity benchmarks (kWh electricity per kWh battery capacity).

cell_manufacturing_kwh_per_kwh_capacity.notes: Dramatic improvement driven by process optimization and 100% renewable energy pledges by major OEMs.

cathode_active_material_energy_mj_per_kg.notes: Includes calcination and synthesis energy. Based on Ecoinvent v3.9 processes.

mining_zones._description: Approximate bounding boxes for major Li/Co mining regions used in coordinate anti-fraud checks.
mining_zones._legal_context: OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals (3rd Ed.)

zones.name: Chile / Argentina Lithium Triangle
zones.notes: Salar-based brine extraction. Water-use controversy ongoing.

zones.name: Democratic Republic of Congo — Cobalt Belt
zones.notes: ~70% of global Co production. OECD flags for human rights and artisanal mining (ASM) risks.

zones.name: Western Australia — Lithium & Nickel
zones.notes: Spodumene hard-rock mining. Australia has strong ESG governance frameworks.

zones.name: Southern Africa — Lithium Belt
zones.notes: Emerging producers; governance quality varies by country.

zones.name: Indonesia — Nickel Belt (Sulawesi)
zones.notes: Largest global Ni reserves; HPAL processing dominates. Deforestation concerns.

zones.name: Philippines — Nickel
zones.notes: Predominantly laterite ore; exported as NPI to China.

battery_performance_benchmarks._description: Typical performance parameter ranges used for data quality checks.

bom_cost_benchmarks_usd_per_kwh._description: Battery pack cost benchmarks (USD/kWh) for market plausibility checks. Source: BNEF EV Battery Price Survey.
